summary: InsinuationEngineRoom is the MuranoOS room for Nik Murano's poetic/aphoristic practice: producing short, conceptually charged lines in the "insinuation + magnitude" register — subtle gesture plus large force — while preserving lexical rarity, avoiding cliche, tracking stems, and curating poems into experimental suites (Bureaucratic Sublime, Domestic Cosmology, Language Cathedral, Temporal Paradox Atlas, Geometry of.
final_use_case: It makes adversarial language and influence mechanisms inspectable by separating phrase, channel, target perception, amplification path, and judgment effect.

Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement. Status: source library.
